info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ASaMse syAdicCAyAM SaMsatIti stutO Bavet  hiMsAyAM Sasati ' (Slo. 183) iti devaH  ktvA - lyapoH vizaye atra viviDAni matAni kfdantarUpamAlAyAM darSitAni  ante ca liKyate - ' IdfSezu sTalezu prayogAH pAWAH ca aniyatAH dfSyante ' iti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'agnihotriRi devatA aSaMsante' (mE0 saM0) ASaMsante kAmapUrtaye tatra lambante
'na nUnaM mayi kEkeyi kiMcidASaMsase guRAn' (rA0 21924) ASaMsase saMBAvayasi jAnAsi
'A tU na indra SaMsaya gozvaSvezu' (f0 1291) ASaMsaya samantAtpraSastAn kurviti sAyaRaH
'sa duzwaH pApamASaMsuH pARqavAnAM mahAtmanAm' (BA0 SAM0 3925) pApamanizwamASaMsuricCuH
'yadvE savAsA araRyaM nodASaMsate niDAya vE tadvAso'timucyate' (Sa0 brA0 5235) araRyaM na kAmayata ityAha ucCabdo nArTe viSezaM karoti
'vratacaryAM vA nodASaMsIta' (Apa0 SrO0 91479) na SakzyAmi kartumityudIkzya nASaMsIta necCedityarTa iti rudradattaH
